sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports experiencing persistent fatigue and occasional shortness of breath, particularly with exertion. He also states he's noticed some swelling in his ankles.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 138/82 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm, regular. Lung auscultation reveals clear breath sounds bilaterally. Lower extremity exam reveals pitting edema in both ankles.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are consistent with possible heart failure.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a BNP level. Initiate low-dose diuretic therapy (furosemide 20mg PO daily). Schedule follow-up with cardiology in one week.
